creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Hello Thomas,

I just saw this PR and realised that I might have never answered on your email;
Is this still a problem with more recent systems? I do not have these problems at
all on none of my machines, so it seems that I cannot reproduce this easily.

Let me know in case there are still problems and I will try to find some spare
time to help you a bit better then in the past.

Thanks
Remko

--
